subject: fix(api): strip trailing slash from API base URL to prevent double-slash
body:
VITE_API_BASE_URL is typically set with a trailing slash (e.g.
"https://tool-till-tees.vercel.app/"). When concatenated with paths
like "/api/forms", this produces a double-slash URL that fails to
fetch, causing the form list to fall back to demo mode and display
"Connect a backend" — even when the user is authenticated.

Fix: strip trailing slashes from API_BASE at init time.

Tags: api, bugfix, mobile
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: backend-connection
Semver: patch
